dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I have been planning something ambitious. The {quest_focus} may hold something extraordinary, and I finally have a plan to reach it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: No one has dared to {quest_action} because of the {quest_threat}. But I have studied the approaches and I believe it can be done. I need {quest_item} from {location_hint} to prepare properly.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we succeed, we could change the fortunes of this entire settlement. Others went in blind: we will not make the same mistake.

playerResponses.text: An adventure worth taking. Count me in.
What happened to the last group that tried?
That sounds like a death wish.

dialogueChunks.intro: I have spent years researching this, {player_name}. The {quest_focus} {quest_focus_has} been sealed for generations, and I finally know how to get inside.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The trick is to {quest_action} without drawing the attention of the {quest_threat}. I need someone brave enough to retrieve {quest_item} from {location_hint}: it is the key to everything.
dialogueChunks.outro: The {quest_stakes} locked away in there could reshape what we know about this land. And of course, there would be {quest_reward_hint} for your trouble.

playerResponses.text: Knowledge and treasure? Say no more.
How do you know the danger will not overwhelm me?
Some things are sealed for a reason.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, our current supply lines are failing. I propose something bold: to {quest_action} through the {quest_focus}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The path is treacherous and the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_has} claimed the area as their own. But if we can clear it, everything changes. I need you to scout {location_hint} and gather {quest_item} to mark the route.
dialogueChunks.outro: The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} depending on this. We must act {quest_time_pressure}, or we lose our window entirely.

playerResponses.text: A bold plan benefits everyone. I will scout it.
Dangerous work. The pay had better match.
Find someone else for this one.
